name: NAD and Redox Restoration Coverage Repair

scope.question: Which known source-completeness gaps for NAD and Redox Restoration need repair, and does resolving them change the coverage verdict or public boundaries?

summary: Coverage repair resolved the named source-completeness gaps by source-reviewing and staging MIB-626 human NAD augmentation sources, MIB-626 disease-boundary evidence, active or completed no-results NR/NMN/MIB-626/MitoQ registries, and recent NAD/redox, supplementation, glutathione-precursor, NAD-homeostasis, and vascular-aging review context. The staged public update keeps NAD and Redox Restoration at low-confidence human_functional_benefit with mixed momentum: the new records improve completeness and branch boundaries, but do not add replicated durable physical function, disease prevention, mortality, or LEV-relevant outcome evidence.

materiality_decision.rationale: The repair changes the public source map, no-results watchlist, and outlook support map without changing stage, momentum, confidence, or rating-change criteria. Public staging is warranted because MIB-626 and active NR/NMN/MitoQ registries materially clarify NAD-precursor target engagement, functional-boundary, safety, and trial-watch coverage.

search_log.summary: Confirmed MIB-626 human target-engagement and physiologic records, a disease-boundary COVID/AKI RCT, and recent NAD/redox, supplementation, glutathione-precursor, NAD-homeostasis, and vascular-aging reviews.

Confirmed active, recruiting, or completed no-results registry records for MIB-626, NR, NMN, and MitoQ programs. These were staged as trial-watch records because they repair source completeness but do not provide efficacy evidence.

Triaged a passive-sensor ancillary registry, a not-yet-recruiting Coenzyme I injection registry, and a nicotinamide falls/frailty registry as excluded or boundary context rather than staged NAD/redox public support.

excluded_sources.title: Passive sensor digital biomarkers during orally administered nicotinamide riboside
excluded_sources.reason: This is an observational passive-sensor add-on to the parent NR Alzheimer/MCI study. The parent interventional registry NCT04430517 was staged instead.

excluded_sources.title: Coenzyme I for injection on vascular aging
excluded_sources.reason: Not-yet-recruiting no-results registry using Coenzyme I injection. It remains taxonomy-boundary context and was not staged because the intervention identity and clinical relevance need future review after recruitment or results.

excluded_sources.title: Nicotinamide supplementation improves physical performance in older adults at risk of falls
excluded_sources.reason: Nicotinamide falls/frailty registry is adjacent to NAD biology but belongs closer to nicotinamide/DNA-repair or separate taxonomy review; it has unknown status and no posted results.

excluded_sources.title: Older-adult resistance training plus creatine trial with oxidative and inflammatory endpoints
excluded_sources.reason: Human trial is exercise plus creatine, not a NAD precursor, GlyNAC, or MitoQ intervention.

excluded_sources.title: Nicotinamide riboside enhanced adoptive T cell therapy in oncology context
excluded_sources.reason: Oncology immunotherapy and preclinical context, not aging-relevant NAD/redox restoration evidence.

excluded_sources.title: NMN alleviated hepatic steatosis in chronic alcohol-fed mice
excluded_sources.reason: Preclinical liver-disease model, not human aging evidence.

excluded_sources.title: MitoQ plus swimming exercise in spinal cord injury rats
excluded_sources.reason: Preclinical spinal-cord-injury exercise model, not human NAD/redox aging evidence.

notes: MIB-626 was staged as a distinct clinical NMN formulation/program while retaining nicotinamide-mononucleotide links in study and finding records.
No-results registries were staged as trial-watch and regulatory/program-update findings, not efficacy findings.
Review records were staged for coverage and taxonomy context, not as primary evidence for a stage upgrade.
The staged outlook preserves human_functional_benefit, mixed momentum, and low confidence.
next_actions: Run source-fidelity, interpretation/forecast, safety-limitations, and taxonomy-mapping reviews.
If approved, publish the staged repair bundle and resume ordinary surveillance for posted NR, NMN, MIB-626, and MitoQ results.
